channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Photos: 'No Kings' protests across the country
item.description: People showed up for rallies in more than 3,000 communities from coast to coast on Saturday, to vent their frustration and decry the policies of the Trump administration.
item.content:encoded:
People showed up for rallies in more than 3,000 communities from coast to coast on Saturday, to vent their frustration and decry the policies of the Trump administration.

(Image credit: KEN CEDENO/AFP via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Meredith Nierman

item.title: Thousands of 'No Kings' protests take place around the world
item.description: Thousands of protests took place around the country today, against the Trump administration. We hear from people who came out about why they were there.
item.content:encoded: Thousands of protests took place around the country today, against the Trump administration. We hear from people who came out about why they were there.
item.dc:creator: Meg Anderson

item.title: This Pennsylvania woman asked friends to help weave her burial casket
item.description: When Maddie Christine Brokop learned she was dying, she invited her friends to help weave the tray she will be buried in.
item.content:encoded: When Maddie Christine Brokop learned she was dying, she invited her friends to help weave the tray she will be buried in.
item.dc:creator: Nic Neves

item.title: The 'No Kings' protest march happens nationwide this weekend
item.description: Protests against the Trump administration are planned to take place around the country today. Organizers say there may be more than 3,000 rallies across 50 states.
item.content:encoded: Protests against the Trump administration are planned to take place around the country today. Organizers say there may be more than 3,000 rallies across 50 states.
item.dc:creator: Meg Anderson

item.title: The experience of one woman's life caring for her adult sister with Down syndrome
item.description: Noreen Vance has cared for her adult sister with Down Syndrome for years. The experience changed her relationships with all her family members.
item.content:encoded: Noreen Vance has cared for her adult sister with Down Syndrome for years. The experience changed her relationships with all her family members.
item.dc:creator: Kat McGowan

item.title: Stuck in a long TSA line? Here are some strategies if you need to rebook your flight
item.description: Extreme TSA lines at airports have left many passengers scrambling to rebook flights missed due to delays. But while airlines say they're helping flyers, they're not obligated to do so.
item.content:encoded:
Extreme TSA lines at airports have left many passengers scrambling to rebook flights missed due to delays. But while airlines say they're helping flyers, they're not obligated to do so.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell

item.title: Over a dozen U.S. soldiers injured in attack on Saudi base as Iran-backed Houthis enter war
item.description: An Iranian strike on an air base in Saudi Arabia wounded at least 15 U.S. service members. Israel also said it intercepted a missile launched from Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen.
item.content:encoded:
An Iranian strike on an air base in Saudi Arabia wounded at least 15 U.S. service members. Israel also said it intercepted a missile launched from Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen.

(Image credit: Majid Saeedi)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Does the U.S. have a chance in the World Cup? 2 important games will provide clues
item.description: The U.S. has gone unbeaten in its past five international matches. But now the team is upping the ante with games against Belgium and Portugal that could show fans whether a deep run is in the cards.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. has gone unbeaten in its past five international matches. But now the team is upping the ante with games against Belgium and Portugal that could show fans whether a deep run is in the cards.

(Image credit: Russell Lewis)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: At 'No Kings' rallies, anti-Trump protesters speak out against ICE 'cruelty,' Iran war
item.description: Organizers behind No Kings, a network of progressive groups, say millions turned out in cities and towns across the country and abroad to speak out against the Trump administration's actions.
item.content:encoded:
Organizers behind No Kings, a network of progressive groups, say millions turned out in cities and towns across the country and abroad to speak out against the Trump administration's actions.

(Image credit: Steven Garcia)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: Man arrested in plot to firebomb Palestinian activist's home after undercover op
item.description: An official who was briefed on the investigation said Alexander Heifler, 26, identified as a member of the JDL 613 Brotherhood, which describes its membership as "Jewish warriors" fighting back against rising antisemitism.
item.content:encoded:
An official who was briefed on the investigation said Alexander Heifler, 26, identified as a member of the JDL 613 Brotherhood, which describes its membership as "Jewish warriors" fighting back against rising antisemitism.

(Image credit: Yuki Iwamura)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
